front: Explain the concept of chemical protein synthesis using ligation-desulfurization.
back: Protein synthesis: NCL of peptide thioesters + Cys peptides -> desulfurization (Raney Ni or VA-044) converts Cys to Ala. Extended to other residues using Ala/Cys/Gly/Val/Phe at ligation sites. Enables total chemical synthesis of proteins up to ~200 residues.
